title: fix: correct renamed GitHub usernames in app directory
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
Two app authors renamed their GitHub accounts, leaving stale usernames in the directory. Verified current logins via the GitHub API by immutable user ID.

- Jarvis AI: `@Marco3113` → `@JustScriptzz` (github_id `195966113`)
- Ai chatbot: `@VriskasYT` → `@Catniti` (github_id `244879637`)
- Regenerated `GREENHOUSE.md` to match

Prod D1 `user` rows were also updated out-of-band in the same pass (data fix, no code change) so the app-submission bot finds the accounts under their current usernames — this is what was blocking the affected submissions.

Fixes #12056
Fixes #12101

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: New names, who dis?
gist.blurb: Updated the app directory to reflect some recent GitHub username changes. Your apps are back to being properly credited to your shiny new handles!
gist.summary: Updated the app directory to reflect GitHub username changes for the authors of Jarvis AI (@JustScriptzz) and Ai chatbot (@Catniti).
gist.impact: The app-submission bot will now correctly recognize these authors under their current GitHub handles, unblocking their submissions.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, updating wooden name tags in a cozy greenhouse setting, representing the updated directory and author credits.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, carefully painting new name tags on wooden signs in a lush digital greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
